panels.description: Rate of failed agent registration attempts. Sustained > 0 means the agent can't talk to admin.
panels.title: Registration Failures (rate)

panels.description: Requests blocked by destination_validator (SSRF allowlist: localhost, metadata services, Docker/K8s ports). Sustained > 0 may mean a misconfigured client or an attempted abuse.
panels.title: Proxy Blocked Requests (rate)

panels.description: Failed SSH authentication attempts. Spikes can mean brute force or misconfigured client keys.
panels.title: SSH Auth Failures (rate)

panels.description: VPN config pull failures or health-check HTTP-fallback report failures. Either signals connectivity trouble between agent and admin.
panels.title: VPN / Health Failures (rate)

panels.description: Number of admins seen in the most recent VPN-based discovery scan.
panels.title: Last Discovery: Admins Found

panels.description: Executions returned in the last admin sync that this agent had already acknowledged.
panels.title: Last Sync: Sent (acked)

panels.description: Executions returned in the last sync that still need acknowledgement.
panels.title: Last Sync: Pending

panels.description: Executions reported back to admin in the most recent batch.
panels.title: Last Report Batch Size

panels.description: Local execution flow: command enqueued in the agent's Oban queue → execution completed. Diverging lines mean a backlog.
panels.title: Execution Lifecycle (rate)

panels.description: Wall time spent running the shell command on the node.
panels.title: Execution Duration (p50/p95/p99)

panels.description: Sync = pulling executions from admin (catches up after admin restart). Report = pushing local results back.
panels.title: Sync & Report Rate

panels.description: Per-sync breakdown. Persistent pending means the agent can't acknowledge fast enough or admin keeps reissuing.
panels.title: Sync Counts (Last Sync)

panels.description: Inbound HTTP CONNECT/proxy connection rate by outcome.
panels.title: HTTP Connections (rate)

panels.description: Inbound SOCKS5 connection rate by outcome.
panels.title: SOCKS5 Connections (rate)

panels.description: Total session duration (handshake + forwarding) by protocol.
panels.title: Session Duration (p95)

panels.description: Tunnel forwarding time only (excludes handshake). Compare with session duration to see handshake overhead.
panels.title: Tunnel Duration (p50/p95/p99)

panels.description: normal = clean EOF. deadline = total-duration cap fired (slowloris). drain_timeout = grace window expired during shutdown.
panels.title: Tunnel Close Rate (by reason)

panels.description: Bytes/sec by direction. up = client→target, down = target→client.
panels.title: Throughput (Bytes/sec)

panels.description: Requests rejected by destination_validator. Reasons: localhost / metadata service / docker / kubernetes / metrics / custom rules.
panels.title: Blocked Requests (by reason)

panels.description: SSH auth attempts. Per-user/method/result breakdown.
panels.title: Auth Rate

panels.description: SSH connection establishment outcomes.
panels.title: Connection Rate

panels.description: SSH session duration percentiles.
panels.title: Session Duration (p50/p95)

panels.description: Agent registration attempts at boot, by outcome.
panels.title: Registration Rate

panels.description: Boot registration latency. Spikes = admin slow or agent retrying.
panels.title: Registration Duration (p95)

panels.description: Periodic admin discovery via VPN.
panels.title: Discovery Scan Rate

panels.description: Number of admins seen in the most recent discovery scan.
panels.title: Admins Found (Last Scan)

panels.description: Daily backstop netclient pull (recovers DNS after netclient restart). success/failure tag from netclient.
panels.title: VPN Config Pull Rate

panels.description: Only fires when VPN is down — agent reports health to admin via HTTP. Failure here means even the fallback path is broken.
panels.title: Health Check Report Rate (HTTP fallback)
